attributes.description:
Optional URL to direct the user to when the breadcrumb item is activated. When set, a link will be rendered
internally. When unset, a button will be rendered instead.
attributes.name: href

attributes.description: Tells the browser where to open the link. Only used when `href` is set.
attributes.name: target

attributes.description: The `rel` attribute to use on the link. Only used when `href` is set.
attributes.name: rel

cssParts.description: The container that wraps the prefix.
cssParts.name: prefix

cssParts.description: The container that wraps the suffix.
cssParts.name: suffix

cssParts.description: The container that wraps the separator.
cssParts.name: separator

properties.description:
Optional URL to direct the user to when the breadcrumb item is activated. When set, a link will be rendered
internally. When unset, a button will be rendered instead.
properties.name: href

properties.description: Tells the browser where to open the link. Only used when `href` is set.
properties.name: target

properties.description: The `rel` attribute to use on the link. Only used when `href` is set.
properties.name: rel

slots.description: An optional prefix, usually an icon or icon button.
slots.name: prefix

slots.description: An optional suffix, usually an icon or icon button.
slots.name: suffix

slots.description: The separator to use for the breadcrumb item. This will only change the separator for this item. If you want to change it for all items in the group, set the separator on `<syn-breadcrumb>` instead.
slots.name: separator

summary: Breadcrumb Items are used inside [breadcrumbs](/components/breadcrumb) to represent different links.
